label: Cloud (speech / TTS)
note: Voice and language support vary by the active cloud speech provider (Cartesia / Edge TTS / MiniMax / OpenRouter). See app/language_map.py for the authoritative per-model language→voice catalog. The `voice` field below accepts free text by default; Model Lab dynamically injects per-provider voice options based on the active SOURCE_LANG/TARGET_LANG at request time.

fields.label: Voice
fields.help: Provider-specific voice identifier (e.g. a Cartesia voice_id, or an OpenRouter/Azure-locale voice id like en-US-Harper:MAI-Voice-2). Leave empty to use the configured provider's default.

fields.label: Style / delivery instructions
fields.help: Free-text style/delivery hint (where supported) -- the static fallback used until the translation LLM infers a live per-utterance tone.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.help: Where supported by the provider. Leave unset to use the provider's default.

fields.label: Top-p
fields.help: Where supported by the provider. Leave unset to use the provider's default.
